sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62275" key="leipw/din" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λειπώδῑν</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῑνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n62275.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">past bearing children</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
